items.caption: A stack of brochures or flyers with a vibrant red-orange color scheme. the topmost brochure is open, revealing text that reads "all things new" in large, bold white letters with a stylized font. below this, there is a date "january 1, 2017 - 12am - 6am" and an address "76013 north manning st. burbank, ca 91506." additional text includes a website address and a phone number, suggesting this is an advertisement or invitation for an event. the background is a gradient of red and orange hues, giving the impression of a sunrise or sunset. a digital rendering or a photograph of a printed material.
a close-up of a stack of mail on a desk.
